title: Reset Active Directory Password
summary: Guide for resetting a user's AD password when they are locked out or have forgotten it.
steps: Verify user identity via manager confirmation or security questions
Navigate to AD Users and Computers > find user > right-click > Reset Password
Set temporary password and check 'User must change password at next logon'
Communicate temporary password via phone (never email)

title: Unlock Active Directory Account
summary: Unlock an AD account locked after repeated failed login attempts.
steps: Open AD Users and Computers
Find user account > Properties > Account tab
Uncheck 'Account is locked out'
Click Apply and OK

title: Reset MFA / Two-Factor Authentication
summary: Re-enroll a user in MFA when they have lost access to their authenticator app.
steps: Verify user identity with manager and employee ID
Navigate to Azure AD > user account > Authentication methods
Delete existing MFA registration
Send re-enrollment link to user's secondary email on file

title: VPN Connection Troubleshooting
summary: Steps to resolve common VPN connectivity issues.
steps: Check internet connectivity without VPN first
Disconnect and reconnect the VPN client
Clear VPN client cache: Help > Clear Cache
If still failing, uninstall and reinstall Cisco AnyConnect
Verify correct VPN endpoint URL in client settings

title: Standard Software Installation — Pre-Approved List
summary: Install pre-approved software from the company catalog.
steps: Open Software Center (Start > Software Center)
Browse or search for the application
Click Install — no admin rights required for approved apps
If software is not in catalog, submit a software request ticket to the software queue

title: WiFi Not Working — Office
steps: Forget the corporate WiFi network and reconnect
Check that corporate certificate is installed (IT > Certificates)
Try connecting to guest WiFi to isolate whether it's device or network
If multiple users affected, escalate to networking infrastructure team

title: Laptop Won't Turn On
summary: Basic hardware checks before dispatching replacement.
steps: Verify charger is connected and charging indicator light is on
Hold power button for 10 seconds (hard reset)
Remove external devices and try again
If still unresponsive, dispatch loaner laptop and schedule hardware inspection
